title: Lunar Surface Infrastructure
prompt: lunar south pole habitat and logistics base, 6 crew modules, ISRU life support, regolith shielding, solar power, autonomous commissioning, concern: dust, thermal cycling, launch cadence and power resilience
executive_summary: Space / Lunar / Orbital Infrastructure scenario view: Base. CASEY indicates $77.4B P50 exposure, $65.0B - $113.8B range, 189 months baseline, Medium-High risk and 49% confidence. Confidence is governed by qualification, thermal-power balance, launch logistics and autonomous recovery. Trade-off: Balanced cost, time and evidence posture.
confidence_explanation: Class 3 Budget Authorization: 10-40% definition maturity drives the starting confidence level.
Schedule Level 4: more detailed schedule logic improves QSRA traceability.
Location/space factor: Moon / Lunar Surface applies a 2.90 delivery premium.
Sector realism envelope applied for Lunar Surface Habitat/Base: cost and schedule constrained to credible early-stage range.
Benchmark memory matched Lunar/Mars Settlement with similarity score 8.
Cost calibrated by blending CASEY template output with benchmark anchor $32.0B.
Schedule calibrated against benchmark duration 156 months.

estimate_quality_index.meaning: Confidence index reflects estimate class, schedule level, benchmark similarity, input quality and risk exposure.

procurement_heatmap.reason: Launch cadence and mission integration dominate delivery exposure.
Procurement path drives cost and schedule confidence.
Utility readiness controls commissioning and phasing.
Integration maturity is a common late-stage failure mode.
Limited supplier base increases price and schedule volatility.
Remote operations reduce recovery options after deployment.

critical_path_narrative: Critical path is likely governed by definition maturity, procurement release and systems commissioning.
Early schedule confidence depends on locking scope, approvals and long-lead package strategy.
Space critical path is additionally controlled by launch integration, payload readiness and remote operations validation.
First schedule control focus should be: Requirements definition and scope freeze.
board_briefing: Launch alone is not the real constraint; qualification, thermal-power balance and autonomous recovery determine mission survivability.
Base scenario is selected; all cards, narratives, QCRA/QSRA and exports are stamped from this scenario payload.
Base scenario: $77.4B P50, $65.0B - $113.8B range, 189 months baseline and 49% confidence.
Confidence is governed by qualification, thermal-power balance, launch logistics and autonomous recovery.

uncertainty_narrative.estimate_maturity: Class 3 maturity is suitable for budget authorization, but procurement and design assumptions still need challenge.
uncertainty_narrative.schedule_maturity: Schedule Level 4 gives stronger logic and QSRA traceability.
uncertainty_narrative.interpretation: Live calibration is weighting mission assurance, launch logistics, qualification evidence and autonomous recovery into the QSRA/QCRA tail.

mission_control_cards.label: Live calibration
mission_control_cards.signal: Current sector conditions are being applied to confidence, contingency and delivery-tail exposure.

mission_control_cards.label: Launch reliability volatility
mission_control_cards.signal: Launch cadence, range access and manifest priority affect schedule certainty.

mission_control_cards.label: Mission assurance burden
mission_control_cards.signal: Qualification and redundancy evidence govern board defensibility.

mission_control_cards.label: Thermal-power balance
mission_control_cards.signal: Power storage and thermal rejection shape survivability.

mission_control_cards.label: Regulatory and range availability
mission_control_cards.signal: Flight approvals, range windows and orbital operations create schedule tails.

casey_thinking: CASEY has re-cut the programme as a Base scenario inside the Space / Lunar / Orbital Infrastructure delivery environment. The governing consequence is: confidence is governed by qualification, thermal-power balance, launch logistics and autonomous recovery. QCRA/QSRA curves, cost basis, risk probabilities and schedule logic are locked to this scenario.
calibration_notes: Sector realism envelope applied for Lunar Surface Habitat/Base: cost and schedule constrained to credible early-stage range.
Benchmark memory matched Lunar/Mars Settlement with similarity score 8.
Cost calibrated by blending CASEY template output with benchmark anchor $32.0B.
Schedule calibrated against benchmark duration 156 months.

risks.title: Launch manifest delay
risks.cause: Launch provider capacity, weather windows, manifest priority or vehicle readiness
risks.risk_event: Confirmed launch slot moves or payload misses manifest gate
risks.impact_description: Programme delay, storage cost, resequencing and mission-readiness risk
risks.description: Confirmed launch slot moves or payload misses manifest gate
risks.trigger: Launch slot not confirmed at L-12 months
risks.mitigation: Reserve alternate launch slot, freeze payload interface, maintain launch-readiness checklist
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $2.7B / $8.5B / $18.6B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.04 Power Generation & Distribution.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 20/60/180 days mapped to activity A1400 Planning, regulatory and stakeholder approvals.

risks.title: Mass growth
risks.cause: Design creep, shielding, redundancy or late payload additions increase mass
risks.risk_event: Payload mass exceeds launch and landing allowance
risks.impact_description: Launch cost, redesign, performance loss and mission safety exposure
risks.description: Payload mass exceeds launch and landing allowance
risks.mitigation: Mass control board, margin policy, design-to-mass reviews
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $3.9B / $10.1B / $21.7B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.05 ECLSS / Life Support.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 15/55/150 days mapped to activity A1500 Procurement strategy and tender packaging.

risks.title: Life-support reliability
risks.cause: ECLSS reliability, spares or redundancy evidence below target
risks.risk_event: Life-support system fails reliability growth or integrated test
risks.impact_description: Crew safety exposure, launch delay, redesign and mission abort risk
risks.description: Life-support system fails reliability growth or integrated test
risks.mitigation: Prototype testing, redundancy, reliability growth, independent assurance
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $4.6B / $11.6B / $24.8B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.06 Payload / Mission Equipment.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 25/80/220 days mapped to activity A1600 Detailed design / IFC development.

risks.title: Market escalation
risks.cause: Supplier market tightness, inflation, FX and long procurement window
risks.risk_event: Rates exceed assumed escalation profile
risks.impact_description: P50 cost becomes understated; commercial approvals or procurement strategy may need reset
risks.description: Rates exceed assumed escalation profile
risks.mitigation: Early procurement, index-linked allowances, market testing, FX strategy
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $3.1B / $7.7B / $15.5B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.08 Launch Services.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 0/0/0 days mapped to activity A1800 Site / launch integration readiness.

risks.title: Design maturity gap
risks.cause: Estimate is based on immature design, incomplete surveys or unresolved interfaces
risks.risk_event: Design basis changes during detailed design
risks.impact_description: Cost growth, quantity movement, rework and schedule resequencing
risks.description: Design basis changes during detailed design
risks.mitigation: Design maturity gates, independent review, assumption register
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $2.3B / $7.0B / $13.9B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 02.01 Test & Qualification Facilities.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 15/45/120 days mapped to activity A2000 Systems integration and testing.

risks.title: Scope growth
risks.cause: Ambiguous requirements, immature scope freeze and late stakeholder changes
risks.risk_event: Approved scope expands after estimate freeze
risks.impact_description: Additional quantities, redesign, rework, procurement churn and board contingency drawdown
risks.description: Approved scope expands after estimate freeze
risks.trigger: Scope change rate exceeds 2% of package value
risks.mitigation: Freeze scope baseline, change board, value gates, client decision log
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $2.3B / $6.2B / $12.4B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.07 Robotics / Autonomous Construction.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 15/45/120 days mapped to activity A1700 Long-lead procurement.

risks.title: Productivity underperformance
risks.cause: Access constraints, poor sequencing, labour scarcity or learning curve
risks.risk_event: Actual production rates underperform plan
risks.impact_description: Extended duration, increased preliminaries and loss of float
risks.description: Actual production rates underperform plan
risks.trigger: SPI/CPI deteriorates for two reporting periods
risks.mitigation: Package productivity controls, daily planning, earned value cadence
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $2.3B / $6.2B / $12.4B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 02.03 Programme Management / PMO.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 15/50/130 days mapped to activity P1000 Launch campaign.

risks.title: Supply chain delay
risks.cause: Long-lead equipment, constrained suppliers or late procurement release
risks.risk_event: Supplier promise dates move right
risks.impact_description: Delayed installation, critical path movement and acceleration cost
risks.description: Supplier promise dates move right
risks.mitigation: Alternate suppliers, early orders, expediting, framework options
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $1.5B / $5.4B / $11.6B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 02.02 Safety & Mission Assurance.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 10/40/120 days mapped to activity A2100 Commissioning, operations readiness and closeout.

risks.title: Interface misalignment
risks.cause: Multiple contractors, unclear interface ownership or late design coordination
risks.risk_event: Package interfaces do not align during installation/integration
risks.impact_description: Rework, claims, delay and fragmented accountability
risks.description: Package interfaces do not align during installation/integration
risks.mitigation: Interface control documents, weekly interface board, accountable owners
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $1.5B / $5.4B / $10.8B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 03.02 Management Reserve.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 10/35/100 days mapped to activity P3000 Power and ECLSS.

risks.title: Commissioning delay
risks.cause: Incomplete readiness, software integration issues or defects during testing
risks.risk_event: Systems fail tests or require repeated commissioning cycles
risks.impact_description: Delayed handover, operational readiness slippage and liquidated damages exposure
risks.description: Systems fail tests or require repeated commissioning cycles
risks.mitigation: Commissioning readiness plan, early test packs, digital systems integration
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $1.5B / $4.6B / $9.3B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 03.01 Risk Contingency / UFE.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 10/35/100 days mapped to activity P2000 Payload integration.

risks.title: Permits / approvals delay
risks.cause: Authority process, stakeholder objections or incomplete submissions
risks.risk_event: Consent milestone slips beyond baseline
risks.impact_description: Critical path delay, extended preliminaries and potential redesign conditions
risks.description: Consent milestone slips beyond baseline
risks.mitigation: Authority plan, consent tracker, early submissions, stakeholder map
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $774M / $3.1B / $6.2B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.09 Transport / Landing / Surface Logistics.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 20/70/180 days mapped to activity A1900 Main construction / fabrication / assembly.

monte_carlo.curve_interpretation: Reference curve: P50 equals the headline estimate; P80/P90 show normal board-level contingency exposure.
curve_readout: Cost P50 reconciles to $77.4B; P80 is $100.6B; P90 is $113.8B.
Schedule P50 reconciles to 189 months; P80 is 246 months; P90 is 278 months.
Selected scenario curve is locked to the same P50/P80/P90 used by the UI and exports.

benchmarks.why: Remote operations, mass constraints, launch windows and harsh environment.
Qualification, launch integration and commissioning sequence.
Space confidence improves fastest through test evidence and heritage.

scenario_comparison.label: Faster
scenario_comparison.why: Parallel design/procurement, acceleration, premium logistics and higher interface risk.

scenario_comparison.label: Cheaper
scenario_comparison.why: Value engineering, tighter scope and procurement competition, with schedule/quality exposure.

scenario_comparison.label: Lower Risk
scenario_comparison.why: More surveys, assurance, stage gates, contingency and schedule buffers.

scenario_comparison.label: Premium
scenario_comparison.why: Best assurance, independent review, early procurement and high-confidence governance.

scenario_comparison.label: Investor
scenario_comparison.why: Investment-framing case with transparent risk and commercial challenge.

scenario_comparison.label: Survival
scenario_comparison.why: Minimum viable scope, warning-heavy, high residual risk.

launch_demo_script: Open with: 'Give me any project on Earth or in Space.'
Type the project into CASEY and hit Generate Full Intelligence Pack.
Show the executive dashboard: cost, schedule, risk, confidence and top drivers.
Switch to Monte Carlo: show QCRA/QSRA P-curves and tornado drivers linked to activities.
Show scenarios: Faster, Cheaper, Lower Risk and Premium with why each changed.
Open Output Centre: Excel, Risk CSV, XER, cost workbook, risk register, schedule export and full pack are ready.
Close with: 'Traditional advisory takes weeks. CASEY gives the first board-grade view in seconds.'
red_flags: Confidence below board-comfort threshold: improve scope definition, benchmark evidence and supplier quotes.
Risk rating requires executive sponsor review and quantified mitigation plan before commitment.
Space programme: verify TRL, launch manifest, mass margins and operations concept before commercial reliance.
board_challenge_questions: What evidence supports the P50 cost and P80 confidence?
Which five risks create most contingency?
Which activities drive the QSRA finish-date risk?
What data would increase confidence before approval?
What is the fastest credible lower-risk path?
What flight heritage, TRL and qualification evidence supports the space assumptions?
next_best_actions: Run a focused evidence workshop on the dominant schedule and commissioning constraint.
Validate the top five CBS cost drivers against benchmark or supplier evidence.
Confirm the Level 3/4 schedule logic, handover gates and critical-path assumptions.
Prepare Base / Faster / Cheaper / Lower-Risk decision paper with explicit trade-offs.
Create a confidence-improvement plan targeting design maturity, procurement evidence and operational readiness.

executive_shock_insight: Launch alone is not the real constraint; qualification, thermal-power balance and autonomous recovery determine mission survivability.
scenario_contradiction: Lower-cost delivery may reduce redundancy and increase resupply dependency.
sector_confidence_drivers: Scope maturity: payload and mission architecture definition
Procurement certainty: launch, avionics and qualified hardware
Schedule maturity: launch and commissioning logic
Operational exposure: remote recovery and servicing limits
why_casey_generated_this: CASEY detected Space / Lunar / Orbital Infrastructure from the project brief and locked the sector ontology before generating outputs.
Sector-native behaviours applied: Launch cadence, Payload integration, Thermal-power balance, Range availability, Autonomous commissioning.
Benchmark cohort, causal chain, confidence drivers and risk language were constrained to the selected sector.
The output is designed for early board challenge and scope definition, not certified pricing.

risks.title: Launch manifest delay
risks.cause: Launch provider capacity, weather windows, manifest priority or vehicle readiness
risks.risk_event: Confirmed launch slot moves or payload misses manifest gate
risks.impact_description: Programme delay, storage cost, resequencing and mission-readiness risk
risks.description: Confirmed launch slot moves or payload misses manifest gate
risks.trigger: Launch slot not confirmed at L-12 months
risks.mitigation: Reserve alternate launch slot, freeze payload interface, maintain launch-readiness checklist
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $2.7B / $8.5B / $18.6B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.04 Power Generation & Distribution.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 20/60/180 days mapped to activity A1400 Planning, regulatory and stakeholder approvals.

risks.title: Mass growth
risks.cause: Design creep, shielding, redundancy or late payload additions increase mass
risks.risk_event: Payload mass exceeds launch and landing allowance
risks.impact_description: Launch cost, redesign, performance loss and mission safety exposure
risks.description: Payload mass exceeds launch and landing allowance
risks.mitigation: Mass control board, margin policy, design-to-mass reviews
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $3.9B / $10.1B / $21.7B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.05 ECLSS / Life Support.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 15/55/150 days mapped to activity A1500 Procurement strategy and tender packaging.

risks.title: Life-support reliability
risks.cause: ECLSS reliability, spares or redundancy evidence below target
risks.risk_event: Life-support system fails reliability growth or integrated test
risks.impact_description: Crew safety exposure, launch delay, redesign and mission abort risk
risks.description: Life-support system fails reliability growth or integrated test
risks.mitigation: Prototype testing, redundancy, reliability growth, independent assurance
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $4.6B / $11.6B / $24.8B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.06 Payload / Mission Equipment.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 25/80/220 days mapped to activity A1600 Detailed design / IFC development.

risks.title: Market escalation
risks.cause: Supplier market tightness, inflation, FX and long procurement window
risks.risk_event: Rates exceed assumed escalation profile
risks.impact_description: P50 cost becomes understated; commercial approvals or procurement strategy may need reset
risks.description: Rates exceed assumed escalation profile
risks.mitigation: Early procurement, index-linked allowances, market testing, FX strategy
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $3.1B / $7.7B / $15.5B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.08 Launch Services.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 0/0/0 days mapped to activity A1800 Site / launch integration readiness.

risks.title: Design maturity gap
risks.cause: Estimate is based on immature design, incomplete surveys or unresolved interfaces
risks.risk_event: Design basis changes during detailed design
risks.impact_description: Cost growth, quantity movement, rework and schedule resequencing
risks.description: Design basis changes during detailed design
risks.mitigation: Design maturity gates, independent review, assumption register
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $2.3B / $7.0B / $13.9B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 02.01 Test & Qualification Facilities.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 15/45/120 days mapped to activity A2000 Systems integration and testing.

risks.title: Scope growth
risks.cause: Ambiguous requirements, immature scope freeze and late stakeholder changes
risks.risk_event: Approved scope expands after estimate freeze
risks.impact_description: Additional quantities, redesign, rework, procurement churn and board contingency drawdown
risks.description: Approved scope expands after estimate freeze
risks.trigger: Scope change rate exceeds 2% of package value
risks.mitigation: Freeze scope baseline, change board, value gates, client decision log
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $2.3B / $6.2B / $12.4B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.07 Robotics / Autonomous Construction.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 15/45/120 days mapped to activity A1700 Long-lead procurement.

risks.title: Productivity underperformance
risks.cause: Access constraints, poor sequencing, labour scarcity or learning curve
risks.risk_event: Actual production rates underperform plan
risks.impact_description: Extended duration, increased preliminaries and loss of float
risks.description: Actual production rates underperform plan
risks.trigger: SPI/CPI deteriorates for two reporting periods
risks.mitigation: Package productivity controls, daily planning, earned value cadence
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $2.3B / $6.2B / $12.4B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 02.03 Programme Management / PMO.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 15/50/130 days mapped to activity P1000 Launch campaign.

risks.title: Supply chain delay
risks.cause: Long-lead equipment, constrained suppliers or late procurement release
risks.risk_event: Supplier promise dates move right
risks.impact_description: Delayed installation, critical path movement and acceleration cost
risks.description: Supplier promise dates move right
risks.mitigation: Alternate suppliers, early orders, expediting, framework options
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $1.5B / $5.4B / $11.6B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 02.02 Safety & Mission Assurance.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 10/40/120 days mapped to activity A2100 Commissioning, operations readiness and closeout.

risks.title: Interface misalignment
risks.cause: Multiple contractors, unclear interface ownership or late design coordination
risks.risk_event: Package interfaces do not align during installation/integration
risks.impact_description: Rework, claims, delay and fragmented accountability
risks.description: Package interfaces do not align during installation/integration
risks.mitigation: Interface control documents, weekly interface board, accountable owners
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $1.5B / $5.4B / $10.8B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 03.02 Management Reserve.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 10/35/100 days mapped to activity P3000 Power and ECLSS.

risks.title: Commissioning delay
risks.cause: Incomplete readiness, software integration issues or defects during testing
risks.risk_event: Systems fail tests or require repeated commissioning cycles
risks.impact_description: Delayed handover, operational readiness slippage and liquidated damages exposure
risks.description: Systems fail tests or require repeated commissioning cycles
risks.mitigation: Commissioning readiness plan, early test packs, digital systems integration
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $1.5B / $4.6B / $9.3B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 03.01 Risk Contingency / UFE.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 10/35/100 days mapped to activity P2000 Payload integration.

risks.title: Permits / approvals delay
risks.cause: Authority process, stakeholder objections or incomplete submissions
risks.risk_event: Consent milestone slips beyond baseline
risks.impact_description: Critical path delay, extended preliminaries and potential redesign conditions
risks.description: Consent milestone slips beyond baseline
risks.mitigation: Authority plan, consent tracker, early submissions, stakeholder map
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $774M / $3.1B / $6.2B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.09 Transport / Landing / Surface Logistics.
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 20/70/180 days mapped to activity A1900 Main construction / fabrication / assembly.

scenario_trade: Balanced cost, time and evidence posture.
scenario_gain: Maintains a credible reference case for board challenge.
scenario_loss: Does not buy extra time certainty or capital efficiency.

risk_register.impact_description: Programme delay, storage cost, resequencing and mission-readiness risk
risk_register.description: Confirmed launch slot moves or payload misses manifest gate
risk_register.trigger: Launch slot not confirmed at L-12 months
risk_register.mitigation: Reserve alternate launch slot, freeze payload interface, maintain launch-readiness checklist
risk_register.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $2.7B / $8.5B / $18.6B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.04 Power Generation & Distribution.
risk_register.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 20/60/180 days mapped to activity A1400 Planning, regulatory and stakeholder approvals.

risk_register.title: Mass growth
risk_register.cause: Design creep, shielding, redundancy or late payload additions increase mass
risk_register.risk_event: Payload mass exceeds launch and landing allowance
risk_register.impact_description: Launch cost, redesign, performance loss and mission safety exposure
risk_register.description: Payload mass exceeds launch and landing allowance
risk_register.mitigation: Mass control board, margin policy, design-to-mass reviews
risk_register.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $3.9B / $10.1B / $21.7B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.05 ECLSS / Life Support.
risk_register.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 15/55/150 days mapped to activity A1500 Procurement strategy and tender packaging.

risk_register.title: Life-support reliability
risk_register.cause: ECLSS reliability, spares or redundancy evidence below target
risk_register.risk_event: Life-support system fails reliability growth or integrated test
risk_register.impact_description: Crew safety exposure, launch delay, redesign and mission abort risk
risk_register.description: Life-support system fails reliability growth or integrated test
risk_register.mitigation: Prototype testing, redundancy, reliability growth, independent assurance
risk_register.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $4.6B / $11.6B / $24.8B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.06 Payload / Mission Equipment.
risk_register.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 25/80/220 days mapped to activity A1600 Detailed design / IFC development.

risk_register.title: Market escalation
risk_register.cause: Supplier market tightness, inflation, FX and long procurement window
risk_register.impact_description: P50 cost becomes understated; commercial approvals or procurement strategy may need reset
risk_register.mitigation: Early procurement, index-linked allowances, market testing, FX strategy
risk_register.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $3.1B / $7.7B / $15.5B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.08 Launch Services.
risk_register.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 0/0/0 days mapped to activity A1800 Site / launch integration readiness.

risk_register.title: Design maturity gap
risk_register.cause: Estimate is based on immature design, incomplete surveys or unresolved interfaces
risk_register.risk_event: Design basis changes during detailed design
risk_register.impact_description: Cost growth, quantity movement, rework and schedule resequencing
risk_register.description: Design basis changes during detailed design
risk_register.mitigation: Design maturity gates, independent review, assumption register
risk_register.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $2.3B / $7.0B / $13.9B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 02.01 Test & Qualification Facilities.
risk_register.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 15/45/120 days mapped to activity A2000 Systems integration and testing.

risk_register.title: Scope growth
risk_register.cause: Ambiguous requirements, immature scope freeze and late stakeholder changes
risk_register.risk_event: Approved scope expands after estimate freeze
risk_register.impact_description: Additional quantities, redesign, rework, procurement churn and board contingency drawdown
risk_register.description: Approved scope expands after estimate freeze
risk_register.trigger: Scope change rate exceeds 2% of package value
risk_register.mitigation: Freeze scope baseline, change board, value gates, client decision log
risk_register.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $2.3B / $6.2B / $12.4B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.07 Robotics / Autonomous Construction.
risk_register.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 15/45/120 days mapped to activity A1700 Long-lead procurement.

risk_register.title: Productivity underperformance
risk_register.cause: Access constraints, poor sequencing, labour scarcity or learning curve
risk_register.impact_description: Extended duration, increased preliminaries and loss of float
risk_register.trigger: SPI/CPI deteriorates for two reporting periods
risk_register.mitigation: Package productivity controls, daily planning, earned value cadence
risk_register.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $2.3B / $6.2B / $12.4B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 02.03 Programme Management / PMO.
risk_register.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 15/50/130 days mapped to activity P1000 Launch campaign.

risk_register.title: Supply chain delay
risk_register.cause: Long-lead equipment, constrained suppliers or late procurement release
risk_register.impact_description: Delayed installation, critical path movement and acceleration cost
risk_register.mitigation: Alternate suppliers, early orders, expediting, framework options
risk_register.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $1.5B / $5.4B / $11.6B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 02.02 Safety & Mission Assurance.
risk_register.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 10/40/120 days mapped to activity A2100 Commissioning, operations readiness and closeout.

risk_register.title: Interface misalignment
risk_register.cause: Multiple contractors, unclear interface ownership or late design coordination
risk_register.risk_event: Package interfaces do not align during installation/integration
risk_register.impact_description: Rework, claims, delay and fragmented accountability
risk_register.description: Package interfaces do not align during installation/integration
risk_register.mitigation: Interface control documents, weekly interface board, accountable owners
risk_register.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $1.5B / $5.4B / $10.8B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 03.02 Management Reserve.
risk_register.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 10/35/100 days mapped to activity P3000 Power and ECLSS.

risk_register.title: Commissioning delay
risk_register.cause: Incomplete readiness, software integration issues or defects during testing
risk_register.risk_event: Systems fail tests or require repeated commissioning cycles
risk_register.impact_description: Delayed handover, operational readiness slippage and liquidated damages exposure
risk_register.description: Systems fail tests or require repeated commissioning cycles
risk_register.mitigation: Commissioning readiness plan, early test packs, digital systems integration
risk_register.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $1.5B / $4.6B / $9.3B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 03.01 Risk Contingency / UFE.
risk_register.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 10/35/100 days mapped to activity P2000 Payload integration.

risk_register.title: Permits / approvals delay
risk_register.cause: Authority process, stakeholder objections or incomplete submissions
risk_register.impact_description: Critical path delay, extended preliminaries and potential redesign conditions
risk_register.mitigation: Authority plan, consent tracker, early submissions, stakeholder map
risk_register.basis_of_cost_impact: O/M/P cost impact equals $774M / $3.1B / $6.2B based on scenario-adjusted exposure to CBS 01.09 Transport / Landing / Surface Logistics.
risk_register.basis_of_schedule_impact: O/M/P schedule impact equals 20/70/180 days mapped to activity A1900 Main construction / fabrication / assembly.

scenario_comparison_vs_base.plain_english: Base versus Base: cost 77.4B to 77.4B, schedule 189 to 189 months, confidence 49% to 49%.

scenario_matrix.label: Base
scenario_matrix.why: Balanced cost, time and evidence posture.; Maintains a credible reference case for board challenge.; Does not buy extra time certainty or capital efficiency.

scenario_matrix.label: Faster
scenario_matrix.why: You bought time by spending money and consuming recovery float.; Earlier revenue / market-entry option and stronger strategic timing.; commissioning validation float, interface stability, procurement optionality and late-stage recovery.

scenario_matrix.label: Cheaper
scenario_matrix.why: You cut capital authorization by moving risk into resilience, redundancy and start-up.; Lower initial approval number and reduced near-term capital draw.; Operational resilience, commissioning flexibility, contingency adequacy and lifecycle certainty.

scenario_matrix.label: Lower Risk
scenario_matrix.why: You bought confidence by adding assurance, float and procurement evidence.; Reduced downside volatility and stronger approval defensibility, at the expense of market timing.; Market-entry acceleration, lean capex posture and near-term strategic timing.

scenario_matrix.label: Premium
scenario_matrix.why: You purchased operational separation, redundancy and downside protection capacity.; Higher mission resilience, commissioning separation and stronger downside containment.; Lean capital optics and minimum-approval positioning.

outputs_board_memo: Base is the reference case: no cost, schedule or confidence delta is applied. Use Faster, Cheaper, Lower Risk or Premium to expose the board trade-off.
Scenario trade: Balanced cost, time and evidence posture.
What you gained: Maintains a credible reference case for board challenge.
What you gave up: Does not buy extra time certainty or capital efficiency.
Board warning: Launch alone is not the real constraint; qualification, thermal-power balance and autonomous recovery determine mission survivability.
Decision rule: do not approve this scenario until the changed risk owner, reserve position and critical-path evidence are explicit.
top_decisions_required: Accept or reject the scenario trade-off explicitly at board level.
Confirm the changed critical path and near-critical path density.
Approve the scenario-specific reserve and contingency philosophy.
Assign named owners for the new top scenario risks.
Confirm whether XER, cost workbook and risk register should be issued as scenario-controlled outputs.

export_scenario_control.xer_logic: critical path, duration and basis changed by scenario
export_scenario_control.cost_logic: CBS basis, reserve and uncertainty spread changed by scenario
export_scenario_control.risk_logic: probability, mitigation and scenario-emergent risks changed by scenario

live_calibration_summary: Current sector conditions are being applied to confidence, contingency and delivery-tail exposure.

live_calibration_signals.basis: Launch cadence, range access and manifest priority affect schedule certainty.
Qualification and redundancy evidence govern board defensibility.
Power storage and thermal rejection shape survivability.
Flight approvals, range windows and orbital operations create schedule tails.

live_calibration_strip: Launch reliability volatility • Mission assurance burden • Thermal-power balance • Regulatory and range availability

audit_spine.detail: Headline, executive narrative, QCRA/QSRA, risk register and exports use the same selected-scenario payload.
Cost P80 and QSRA P80 246 months are visible for board challenge.
Board posture remains tied to evidence closure, not dashboard colour.
